review.citation: An D, et al. Intranasal Ketamine for Depression in Adults: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis. Frontiers in Psychology. 2021.

identity.title: Intranasal Ketamine for Depression in Adults: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Trials

question.naturalLanguageInput: Does intranasal ketamine or esketamine improve depression in adults, and what adverse effects does it cause?
question.structuredInput: In adults with major depressive disorder, especially treatment-resistant depression, compare intranasal ketamine or esketamine with placebo or active control for response, remission, depressive symptoms, tolerability, and adverse events; include randomized double-blind controlled trials.
eligibilityCriteria: Adults with major depressive disorder or treatment-resistant depression

identity.title: A randomized controlled trial of intranasal ketamine in major depressive disorder
Efficacy and Safety of Intranasal Esketamine for the Rapid Reduction of Symptoms of Depression and Suicidality in Patients at Imminent Risk for Suicide
Efficacy and Safety of Intranasal Esketamine Adjunctive to Oral Antidepressant Therapy in Treatment-Resistant Depression: A Randomized Clinical Trial
Efficacy and Safety of Fixed-Dose Esketamine Nasal Spray Combined With a New Oral Antidepressant in Treatment-Resistant Depression: TRANSFORM-1
Efficacy and Safety of Esketamine Nasal Spray Plus an Oral Antidepressant in Elderly Patients With Treatment-Resistant Depression-TRANSFORM-3
Efficacy and Safety of Flexibly Dosed Esketamine Nasal Spray Combined With a Newly Initiated Oral Antidepressant in Treatment-Resistant Depression

prohibitedCitationSeeds.title: Intranasal Ketamine for Depression in Adults: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Trials

esketamine nasal spray treatment resistant depression randomized trial
pubMedQueries: ("Depressive Disorder, Major"[MeSH Terms] OR depression[Title/Abstract] OR "treatment resistant depression"[Title/Abstract]) AND (intranasal[Title/Abstract] OR "nasal spray"[Title/Abstract]) AND (ketamine[Title/Abstract] OR esketamine[Title/Abstract])
(ketamine[Title/Abstract] OR esketamine[Title/Abstract]) AND intranasal[Title/Abstract] AND randomized controlled trial[Publication Type]
